▸ 	Part 2: Live Q&A (type your q's into chat)
▸ 	Give as much detail as possible.
▸ 	Be ready to answer some clarifying q's
▸ 	Be willing to drill deeper until you feel confident taking
action.

WHY WE USE IT
10X LAUNCHES - OFFICE HOURS 2

-- 18 of 30 --

10X LAUNCHES - OFFICE HOURS 2
▸ 	Final 48 hours are reserved for coaching "Decisiveness": 	If your
prospect has opened other emails, visited your sales page, and
missed other sub-deadlines (fast action/mid-cart), then chances are
they're experiencing decision anxiety.
▸ 	Empathy works better than aggression
▸ 	Instead of calling out the "tire kickers", show how other tire kickers
(yourself included) became Ferrari drivers
▸ 	Turn "tire kicking" into a part of the buying process.
▸ 	Instead of telling them that it SHOULD be obvious - show them
why and when it WILL be.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 30 --

BONUS THEMEPLATE #2 - CAPTAIN OBVIOUS
SO WE USE THIS THEMEPLATE TO:
▸ 	Empathize with indecision: 	By showing how we've struggled with
it ourselves. 	It's normal and overcomeable.
▸ 	Use Story to Show Yourself Overcoming Indecision: 	Give them a
hero (and a proxy) to experience this before asking them to act on
it in relation to your offer.
▸ 	Show how the decision will be obvious : 	By future pacing the
outcomes (and the overcoming of pain) that your offer provides.
▸ 	Acknowledge and Disarm Resistance : 	By offering them the lens of
hindsight aka looking back on the decision from a favorable place
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 30 --

WHERE WE USE IT
10X LAUNCHES - OFFICE HOURS 2
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 30 --

BONUS THEMEPLATE #2 - THE "CAPTAIN OBVIOUS"
WHERE WE USE IT
▸ 	Final 48 hours: Ideally a few hours after the
"Perfect For You If" Themeplate which
challenges your prospect to make a decision
▸ 	option to send to ONLY those who opened
and/or visited the sales page.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
